violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the (ice machine) have an small accumulation of biofilm Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025

The floors in storage room, back kitchen, and front counter area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
Inspector observed bags of buns with rodent gnaw marks.PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings in prep unit bottom shelves, kitchen, back storage room, and old equipment(back storage) ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (back kitchen ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep unit bottom shelves(electrical area) and vegetable slicer ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

The floors in back storage areas and kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
Inspector observed bags of buns with gnaw marks and rodent droppings.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (gnaw marks in bread and droppings throughout kitchen and storage areas ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil, food debris, and grease/soil buildup. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The (walls and coving ) in the (kitchen and storage ) area is in poor repair. Observed holes , cracks, and coving detaching from wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair.PIC stated a work order was put in to repair the damages. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025
Inspector observed bags of bread with gnawed marks, rodent droppings, and live activity.PIC voluntarily disposed of product. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (live activity, rodent droppings in the bread and back storage area, and nesting material in back storage area ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and grease buildup. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The (walls and coving) in the (kitchen) area is in poor repair. Observed cracks and coving detaching from wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

Oil was observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of: 1. Fryers (grease debris) 2. Ovens (food debris) 3. Hot hold units (food debris) 4. Shelving (food debris) 5. Vents (dust/dirt debris) New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
Grey water was observed stagnant in mop sink area. Liquid wastes to be drained to disposal per law. Specific zoned area closed during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
